mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient rewards Hamming/prefix proximity to the multi-byte Lab/XYZ FOURCC tokens, letting value_profile_cmplog incrementally climb the color-space switch arm that I2S-only cmplog cannot reliably reach.
one_line: VP gradient climbs Lab/XYZ FOURCC switch that I2S alone misses

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP per-byte Hamming/prefix gradient rewards inputs that progressively satisfy each of the four is_ICC_signature_char sub-comparisons, guiding value_profile_cmplog toward a fully valid 4-byte signature word that plain cmplog cannot assemble.
one_line: VP gradient satisfies four ICC-char range sub-comparisons byte by byte

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient rewards inputs that match progressively more of the prefix-compare loop and approach the ':' literal, letting VPC ratchet a seed into the QName+colon shape that cmplog's edge-only signal cannot bridge.
one_line: VP gradient assembles prefix match followed by ':' byte for QName gate

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient rewards inputs incrementally closer to satisfying byte-comparison-driven lookahead inside xmlParseLookupInternalSubset, giving VPC a smooth path to a complete internal DTD subset that cmplog's edge-bucket signal cannot climb.

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient gives partial-match credit on the conjunctive 'xmlns' byte-by-byte equality cascade (att[0..4] == 'x','m','l','n','s'), accumulating progress toward the namespace-decl path that cmplog cannot drive because it has no distance-bucket feedback.
one_line: VP gradient accumulates byte-by-byte progress through conjunctive 'xmlns' equality cascade

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient buckets Hamming/prefix distance to the 4-byte 'size' constant, steering the corpus incrementally toward the exact tag equality that I2S-only cmplog (which never produces the 'size' run) fails to assemble.

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient rewards inputs progressively matching more bytes of the 'size' closure tag at line 813, providing an intermediate climbing signal toward the 4-byte equality that cmplog-only edge feedback cannot supply.
